purpose: Base capability map for the Tilelli project-of-projects agent.
mission: Operate the Tilelli project-of-projects edge backend, static sites, automation jobs, and data stores through narrow capabilities.
principles: Use the Cloudflare Global API Key only as a bootstrap credential.
Mint scoped API tokens for day-to-day deployment and database work.
Keep secrets out of git, browser code, logs, and client-side HTML.
Prefer idempotent scripts that can be rerun safely.

cloudflare_workers_d1_deployer.description: Deploy Tilelli Workers and manage D1 databases for this Cloudflare account.

cloudflare_observer.description: Read-only account observer for inventory, health checks, and diagnostics.

cloudflare_token_minter.description: Mint future narrower user tokens. Keep highly restricted and rotate.

executionModel.local: Wrangler commands and scripts run from the repo using TILELLI_ variables.
executionModel.githubActions: CI deploys Workers with TILELLI_CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN stored as a GitHub secret.
executionModel.cloudflareCron: Worker scheduled handlers write heartbeat and future automation run records into D1.
